## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Compatibility

Describe user-visible, configuration, platform, or migration effects. Write
`None` when there are none.

## Verification

List the checks performed, including relevant commands such as `make check`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when needed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private data are included.
- [ ] The pull request is focused on one coherent change.
